scripts.watch-assets: npm run build:tokens && wp-scripts start --config webpack.dev.config.js
scripts.make-pot:free: wp i18n make-pot dist-free dist-free/languages/ninja-media.pot --domain=ninja-media --slug=ninja-media --package-name="Ninja Media" --exclude=assets,vendors,freemius --headers='{"Report-Msgid-Bugs-To":"https://wordpress.org/support/plugin/ninja-media"}'
scripts.make-pot:wporg: wp i18n make-pot dist-wporg dist-wporg/languages/ninja-media.pot --domain=ninja-media --slug=ninja-media --package-name="Ninja Media" --exclude=assets,vendors,freemius --headers='{"Report-Msgid-Bugs-To":"https://wordpress.org/support/plugin/ninja-media"}'
scripts.free: npm run strip-premium && npm --prefix dist-free run buildSass && npm --prefix dist-free run buildPostcss && npm --prefix dist-free run build-admin && npm run clean-maps:free && npm run make-pot:free && npm run zip:free
scripts.wporg: npm run strip-premium:wporg && npm --prefix dist-wporg run buildSass && npm --prefix dist-wporg run buildPostcss && npm --prefix dist-wporg run build-admin && npm run clean-maps:wporg && npm run make-pot:wporg && npm run zip:wporg
scripts.test:php:start: wp-env start && wp-env run tests-cli phpunit
scripts.build: npm run buildSass && npm run buildPostcss && concurrently "npm:build-*" && npm run clean-maps
scripts.make-pot: WP_CLI_PHP_ARGS='-d memory_limit=512M' wp i18n make-pot . languages/ninja-media.pot --domain=ninja-media --slug=ninja-media --package-name="Ninja Media" --exclude=node_modules,assets,dist-wporg,dist-free,freemius,vendor --headers='{"Report-Msgid-Bugs-To":"https://wordpress.org/support/plugin/ninja-media"}'
scripts.build:zip: npm run build && npm run plugin:zip && npm run wporg && npm run free
scripts.build:zip:pro: npm run build && npm run make-pot && npm run plugin:zip
scripts.deploy:freemius: npm run build && npm run make-pot && npm run plugin:zip && node scripts/deploy-freemius.js
scripts.deploy:freemius:live: npm run build && npm run make-pot && npm run plugin:zip && RELEASE_MODE=released node scripts/deploy-freemius.js
